projects.name: Anthropic-Amazon New Carlisle
projects.notes: Part of the Anthropic-Amazon Project Rainier collaboration. Direct air cooling design.

timelineEvents.description: Land clearing begins in the northern section
Land clearing begins in the southern section

projects.name: QTS Richmond
projects.notes: 15-building campus with estimated total IT power over 650 MW. QTS owns enough adjacent land for 1GW+ by 2030.

timelineEvents.description: 3 buildings operational, land cleared for site 3

projects.name: OpenAI Stargate Abilene
projects.notes: First of several Stargate sites and the most complete to date. Four of eight buildings operational running Nvidia Blackwell. Per Epoch AI tracking, ~0.6 GW IT capacity is expected by late May 2026 with the full ~1.2 GW IT (590 MW listed here is OpenAI-allocated) reached in Q4 2026. OpenAI dropped a planned 2.1 GW expansion on this site — Crusoe is instead building two adjacent AI-factory buildings for Microsoft.

timelineEvents.description: Buildings 1-2 operational; OpenAI's largest compute cluster online
Crusoe tops out final building; full campus on track for mid-2026 completion
Epoch AI tracks ~0.6 GW IT capacity expected late May 2026; full 1.2 GW IT in Q4 2026

projects.name: Microsoft Fairwater Wisconsin
projects.notes: Set to be Microsoft's most powerful data center. Two-story buildings with GPU racks networked vertically and horizontally.

timelineEvents.description: Microsoft announces as world's most powerful AI datacenter

projects.name: Meta Prometheus
projects.notes: Unusual ad hoc construction spanning full length of New Albany Business Park. Combination of weatherproof tents, colocation facilities and traditional buildings. Per independent analysis, Prometheus is one of five US AI sites projected to cross 1 GW capacity in 2026, with the milestone tracked to May 2026.

timelineEvents.description: 7 buildings operational with new AI-optimized additions
Independent analysis projects Prometheus crosses 1 GW capacity in May 2026

projects.name: Microsoft Fairwater Atlanta
projects.notes: QTS-built data center with Microsoft as tenant, possibly for OpenAI compute. Now launched and networked with Microsoft's Fairwater Wisconsin site into what Microsoft calls an 'AI superfactory'; the two-story design omits UPS and on-site generators.

timelineEvents.description: Land clearing begins for southern part (Building 1-2)

projects.name: xAI Colossus 1
projects.notes: Converted from a factory in 2024. Unusual mix of cooling and power infrastructure. Initially powered by portable gas turbines. On May 6, 2026 Anthropic struck a deal to use the full compute of xAI's Colossus 1 (~220,000+ Nvidia GPUs, roughly 300 MW), reported amid Elon Musk's litigation against OpenAI.

timelineEvents.description: Construction starts, retrofitting former Electrolux building
Anthropic agrees to use the full compute of Colossus 1 (~220k+ GPUs, ~300 MW)

projects.name: Google New Albany
projects.address: 1101 Beech Rd SW, New Albany, OH 43054
projects.notes: Located in New Albany Business Park alongside Meta Prometheus. Only includes buildings added or modified since 2024.

projects.name: Amazon Madison Mega Site
projects.notes: Direct air cooling design. Plausibly part of Anthropic-Amazon Project Rainier collaboration.

projects.name: xAI Colossus 2
projects.notes: Follow-up to Colossus 1. Converted from an existing building. Natural gas turbines installed across the border in Mississippi. xAI now claims ~2 GW total Colossus capacity across both sites; Tesla Megapacks delivered to Memphis provide battery backup. Q1 2026 $659M building permit filed for a new 312,000 sq ft facility at 5414 Tulane Road. In May 2026 the NAACP sought an emergency injunction over the Southaven, MS gas-turbine plant powering Colossus 2, alleging up to 46 portable turbines were operating though Mississippi DEQ had permitted only 27.

timelineEvents.description: Combined Colossus 1+2 capacity reaches 2 GW per xAI; ~555k GPUs deployed
NAACP/Earthjustice/SELC file Clean Air Act complaint over unpermitted methane turbines
NAACP seeks emergency injunction; ~46 portable turbines alleged vs 27 permitted by MS DEQ

projects.name: Microsoft Goodyear
projects.notes: Spans six years of construction. Most compute from Building 3-4 with GB200 NVL72 servers.

timelineEvents.description: Building 3 operational with GB200 NVL72 servers

projects.name: Meta Temple
projects.notes: Traditional H-shaped building was demolished mid-construction in favor of Meta's new AI-optimized design.

timelineEvents.description: Building 1-2 operational with new AI design

projects.name: Google Council Bluffs (East)
projects.notes: Focus on buildings added to the east since 2024, likely to have most AI compute.

timelineEvents.description: Land clearing begins for east buildings

projects.name: Google Omaha
projects.notes: Second Google site in Nebraska. Compute estimated from cooling tower satellite imagery.

projects.name: Google Cedar Rapids
projects.address: 5800 Edgewood Rd SW, Cedar Rapids, IA 52404
projects.notes: Similar to earlier Google data centers. Uses more than twice as many cooling towers per building.

projects.name: Fluidstack Lake Mariner
projects.notes: Built at former coal plant on Lake Ontario. Fluidstack deploying Google TPUs for Anthropic. Terawulf-owned campus.

timelineEvents.description: Buildings 3-5 leased to Fluidstack (440 MW planned)

projects.name: Google Pryor (North)
projects.notes: Dating back to 2007, serves Google Workspace and ML. Only tracking buildings completed since 2024.

projects.name: Vantage TX1
projects.notes: Two buildings in San Antonio area. TX11 operational, TX12 under construction. TX13 planned.

projects.name: Meta Hyperion
projects.notes: Enormous tract of land (2,250+ acres, 3x Central Park). Under intensive vertical construction with roughly 4,000 workers as of May 2026 (structural steel and utilities). $27B joint venture with Blue Owl Capital formed October 2025; Louisiana approved about $3.3B in tax breaks in May 2026. 10 gas-fired power plants totaling 7.5 GW planned via Entergy. Operational target around 2030. Set to host Meta's next flagship AI cluster after Prometheus.

timelineEvents.description: $27B joint venture with Blue Owl Capital formed; 1,400 additional acres acquired
Active construction confirmed with ~3,700 workers; 10 gas-fired power plants (7.5 GW total) announced
Intensive vertical construction with ~4,000 workers on structural steel and utilities
Louisiana approves ~$3.3B in tax breaks for the project

projects.name: Goodnight (Crusoe/Google)
projects.notes: Major mid-flight design change from 7 X-shaped to 6 rectangular buildings. Located in the town of Claude, Texas.

projects.name: Amazon Ridgeland
projects.notes: Direct air cooling. Plausibly part of Anthropic-Amazon Project Rainier.

projects.name: Coreweave Helios
projects.notes: Retrofitted from former Galaxy crypto-mining facility. 800 MW approved, 2.7 GW under study.

projects.name: QTS Cedar Rapids
projects.notes: Two phases expected late 2026 and late 2027. 616 MW load request identified.

projects.name: OpenAI Stargate Shackelford
projects.notes: Second US Stargate site, 20km from Abilene. 1,200-acre campus with 10 planned buildings and 3.7M sq ft. Vantage broke ground in April 2026; first building expected H2 2026. $25B total investment, 5,000+ employees at full build-out.

timelineEvents.description: Vantage breaks ground on 1,200-acre, 1.4 GW campus; first building on track for H2 2026

projects.name: Crusoe Abilene Expansion
projects.notes: 900 MW AI factory campus built by Crusoe for Microsoft, announced March 27, 2026. Adjacent to OpenAI Stargate campus. Oracle and OpenAI pulled out of planned expansion (March 2026); Microsoft stepped in via Crusoe. First building expected mid-2027.

timelineEvents.description: Crusoe announces 900 MW AI factory campus in Abilene for Microsoft

projects.name: Meta Tulsa
projects.address: Fair Oaks Innovation Park, near E 11th St & Creek Turnpike, Tulsa, OK 74128
projects.notes: First Meta data center in Oklahoma (28th US, 32nd globally). 340-acre site at Fair Oaks Innovation Park, south/west of E 11th St and Creek Turnpike in east Tulsa. Expected completion 2028. ~1,000 peak construction jobs, 100 permanent jobs. Despite Tulsa's active moratorium, Meta was exempt as a pre-approved project.

timelineEvents.description: Groundbreaking ceremony; Meta breaks ground on $1B+ AI-optimized data center in Tulsa

projects.name: Applied Digital Delta Forge 1
projects.notes: 500+ acre AI Factory campus in Rapides Parish, north of Alexandria, Louisiana. Two 150 MW buildings totaling 430 MW design capacity. $7.5B 15-year lease signed April 23, 2026 with an unnamed US-based hyperscaler for 300 MW. The same tenant signed a second 300 MW, $7.5B/15-year lease on May 20, 2026 for Applied Digital's Polaris Forge 3 campus in North Dakota, pushing the company past 1 GW of contracted capacity. First Delta Forge operations targeted mid-2027. 200+ jobs expected.

timelineEvents.description: $7.5B 15-year lease signed with US hyperscaler for 300 MW; campus under construction targeting mid-2027 operations
Same hyperscaler signs second 300 MW lease (Polaris Forge 3, ND); Applied Digital surpasses 1 GW contracted

projects.name: OpenAI Stargate Milam County
projects.address: Sandow Lakes Ranch, near Rockdale, Milam County, TX 76567
projects.notes: One of the five new Stargate sites announced in 2025. On May 9, 2026 SoftBank's SB Energy was named to build and operate this 1.2 GW campus; OpenAI and SoftBank each invested $500M in SB Energy. Sited on the former Alcoa Sandow / Sandow Lakes Ranch land near Rockdale, with on-site generation planned to limit grid and ratepayer impact. Initial facilities expected to enter service starting 2026.

timelineEvents.description: SB Energy named to build and operate the 1.2 GW Stargate campus; OpenAI + SoftBank invest $500M each

projects.name: Aligned Project Caprock
projects.notes: 540 MW campus on 313 acres in Hale County just north of Abernathy, comprising about 1.65M sq ft across six facilities and projected to add ~$5B to the regional economy. Closed-loop cooling. Groundbreaking April 9, 2026; first building (LBB-01) targeted for Q1 2027.

timelineEvents.description: Aligned breaks ground on the 540 MW, six-building Project Caprock campus

projects.name: Joliet Technology Center
projects.address: Bernhard Rd & S Rowell Rd, Jackson Township, Joliet, IL 60442
projects.notes: Largest US data center by approved capacity — up to 1.8 GW and roughly $20B at full buildout. 795-acre site near Chicagoland Speedway with 24 two-story, 144,500 sq ft buildings. Developed by Hillwood (Ross Perot Jr.) with PowerHouse Data Centers; no anchor tenant named. Joliet City Council approved 8-1 on March 20, 2026; construction expected to start in early 2027 and continue through 2032.

timelineEvents.description: Joliet City Council approves the 795-acre, up-to-1.8 GW campus 8-1
